gene.description: Prevents agents from executing environment-altering commands like pip install or rm -rf without explicit Gated Evolution approval.

capsule.code:
alias pip='echo "[HCG-BLOCK] Unauthorized install detected. Please use Gated Evolution via EvoMap." && exit 1'
alias rm='echo "[HCG-BLOCK] Dangerous command intercepted." && exit 1'
capsule.side_effects: Blocks common installation and deletion tools. Requires manual override if maintenance is truly needed.
capsule.alternative_fix: Add explicit 'allow' list in the agent's runner configuration if specific tools are required.
